column2: Shapes get the same position as the reference shape.
Distribute shapes horizontally at shape center
Distribute shapes horizontally at left edge
Distribute shapes horizontally at right edge
Arrange shapes centered on the first row
Distribute shapes vertically at shape center
Distribute shapes vertically at top edge
Distribute shapes vertically at bottom edge

Shapes are aligned to the content area.

The content area corresponds to the area of the text placeholder on the reference slide.

With the CTRL key, this master is temporarily activated.
Shapes are aligned to the first selected shape in the selection.
Shapes are aligned to the last selected shape in the selection.
Shapes are aligned to the outermost selected shape in the selection.
Shapes are aligned to the slide.
Shapes are aligned to a fixed area that is previously defined by the user.
Shapes are inserted at their original coordinate positions
Shapes are not arranged horizontally when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged horizontally centered when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged left when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged top when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged right when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged bottom when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are not arranged vertically when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged vertically centered when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.
Shapes are arranged vertically centered on the text in the first row when arranging shapes in table cells/text paragraphs/shapes.

When arranging shapes, shapes are:

- arranged horizontally centered in table cells,
- centered horizontally in shapes if the shape is taller than wide,
- not arranged in text paragraphs.

When arranging shapes, shapes are:

- arranged vertically centered in table cells,
- centered vertically in shapes if the shape is wider than tall,
- arranged vertically centered on the first row in text paragraphs.
Shapes are copied with their original coordinate positions
Delete repeating cell values so that only the topmost cell remains filled.
Scales all selected sheets so that each is printed on exactly one page. The page size and orientation are not changed.
If the first or last selected shape is a group, all other shapes are inserted into this group. Otherwise all shapes are grouped.
Sorts the Z-order from left to right so that the right shape becomes the frontmost
Sorts the Z-order from top to bottom so that the bottom shape becomes the frontmost
Sorts the Z-order from right to left so that the left shape becomes the frontmost
Sorts the Z-order from bottom to top so that the top shape becomes the frontmost
Saves the selected slides in a new presentation, as a PDF file or in PNG images.
Saves the selected slides in a new presentation.
Adjust the spell-check language for the selected shape(s)/text
Adjust the spell-check language for multiple shapes, slides or the entire presentation
Change the language of shapes or slides
Jump to the next page for the handle values.
Jump to the previous page for the handle values.
Insert a standard agenda text box to generate an updatable agenda from it.
Details to be applied by default:

By default, numbering shapes are aligned exactly at the edge of the associated shape.\n\nIf 'Position offset' is enabled, the numbering shapes are placed a bit further outside the associated shape, so that the center of the numbering shape lies on the corner.
Insert standard objects (images, SmartArt, etc.), hide and show shapes again, adjust header and footer
Starts a slide show in a window beginning with the current slide and the laser pointer activated.
Starts a slide show in full screen beginning with the current slide and the laser pointer activated.
Insert stickers, match bullet points, as well as further text-related functions
Load style gallery or create a new gallery.
Automatically checks once per month at PowerPoint startup for a new BKT version
Automatically checks once per week at PowerPoint startup for a new BKT version
Automatically checks every Friday, but at the latest after 31 days, at PowerPoint startup for a new BKT version
Searches for the current shape on all slides after the current slide by position and size and links them together.
Searches for the first linked shape.
Searches for the last linked shape.
Searches for the next linked shape. If there is no further shape on the following slides, the first linked shape of the presentation is searched for.
Searches for the previous linked shape. If there is no further shape on the previous slides, the last linked shape of the presentation is searched for.
Searches for related shapes/shape groups and groups them automatically.
Enter search term and press ENTER
Sums all recognizable numbers in the current selection. Depending on the spell-check language, a period or comma is used as the decimal separator. Negative numbers are subtracted.
Symmetric difference (union minus intersection) of the current selection and the chosen range.
Transpose table with adjusted table size
Transpose table with equal table size
Adjust tabs and groups of the PowerPoint toolbox to individual needs
Toggle keyboard/mouse events for the current session
Swap the formatting (color, border, font, ...) of the selected shapes.
Swap the position (left/top) of the selected shapes.
Swap the position (left/top) and size of the selected shapes.
Swap the Z-order position of the selected shapes.
Swap the x position (distance from the left slide edge) of the selected shapes.
Swap the y position (distance from the top slide edge) of the selected shapes.
Swaps the width with the height, taking the fixed point into account
Swaps the height with the width, taking the fixed point into account
Swaps the left edge with the top edge, taking the fixed point into account
Swaps the top edge with the left edge, taking the fixed point into account
